name: Adv. Priya Sharma
bio: Senior criminal defense attorney with 12 years of experience in the Delhi High Court. Specializes in cyber crime cases and has successfully defended over 200 clients.

faqs.question: What should I prepare for our first criminal defense consultation?
faqs.answer: Please bring a copy of the FIR (First Information Report), any notices served by the police, and a detailed timeline of events written in chronological order.

faqs.question: Do you assist with anticipatory bail applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, I regularly represent clients in urgent anticipatory bail hearings before the Sessions Court and the High Court.

accolades.title: Top Cyber Law Expert
accolades.description: Awarded by the Cyber Security Association of India for exemplary contributions to digital forensics and defense.

accolades.title: Outstanding Young Counsel
accolades.description: Recognized by the Delhi Bar Council for high success rates in complex white-collar crime defense.

casesList.title: State v. Tech Solutions Corp
casesList.description: Defended corporate officers accused of data breaches and conspiracy. Proven in court that access logs were manipulated.

casesList.title: Anticipatory Bail - Financial Fraud Allegation
casesList.description: Secured absolute protection from arrest for a senior director facing unfounded corporate embezzlement charges.

name: Adv. Rajesh Kumar
bio: Leading civil litigation lawyer with extensive experience in property disputes and contract enforcement. Practises in the Bombay High Court and various civil courts across Maharashtra.

faqs.question: How long does a typical property inheritance partition suit take?
faqs.answer: Partition suits can take anywhere from 1.5 to 3 years depending on the number of parties, availability of land records, and whether disputes can be settled through mediation.

faqs.question: What is your approach to breach of contract disputes?
faqs.answer: I always recommend a formal legal notice and mediation first. If the other party is uncooperative, we initiate civil proceedings seeking specific performance and damages.

accolades.title: Legal Icon of the Year - Civil Law
accolades.description: Conferred at the National Law Awards for outstanding advocacy in property disputes.

accolades.title: Senior Advocate Designation Recommendation
accolades.description: Recommended by the High Court bar association panel for civil law mastery.

casesList.title: Landlord-Tenant Ancestral Property Dispute
casesList.description: Successfully represented the landlord in reclaiming a prime commercial property in South Mumbai after a 12-year legal battle.

casesList.title: M/s Alpha Builders v. Metro Corp
casesList.description: Secured an award of ₹4.5 Crore in damages for a client due to wrongful contract termination by a governmental body.

name: Adv. Sunita Mehta
bio: Compassionate family law attorney helping clients navigate the most challenging personal legal situations. Expert in matrimonial disputes, divorce proceedings, and child custody matters.

faqs.question: What is the difference between mutual consent divorce and contested divorce?
faqs.answer: Mutual consent divorce is quicker (typically resolved in 6-18 months) and requires both partners to agree on terms. Contested divorce is initiated by one partner based on grounds like cruelty or desertion, and takes longer.

faqs.question: Can child custody agreements be modified after the divorce is finalized?
faqs.answer: Yes, custody arrangements can be altered if there is a significant change in circumstances or if it's proven to be in the child's best educational/emotional interests.

accolades.title: Family Law Advocate of the Year
accolades.description: Awarded by Bangalore Legal Forum for protecting child interests in custody trials.

casesList.title: Custody of Minor Child - NRI Father Appeal
casesList.description: Represented the mother in securing sole legal custody of a 6-year-old child, demonstrating safety concerns.

casesList.title: Matrimonial Asset Division Settlement
casesList.description: Facilitated a clean, mutually agreed ₹2.5 Crore alimony settlement, avoiding years of bitter court battles.

name: Adv. Amit Verma
bio: Corporate law specialist with deep expertise in M&A, joint ventures, and commercial contracts. Has advised Fortune 500 companies and Indian startups on complex transactions worth billions.

faqs.question: What key clauses should early-stage startups focus on in Shareholder Agreements?
faqs.answer: Startups should prioritize vesting schedules, liquidation preferences, drag-along/tag-along rights, and robust dispute resolution mechanisms.

faqs.question: Do you help with corporate compliance and secretarial audits?
faqs.answer: Yes, my firm offers comprehensive ROC filing support, compliance audits, and corporate governance consulting.

accolades.title: M&A Dealmaker of the Year
accolades.description: Recognized by Legal500 India for closing major domestic logistics acquisition.

casesList.title: Acquisition of Zenith Logi-Solutions
casesList.description: Acted as lead counsel for a tech startup acquiring a logistics competitor for ₹150 Crore.

casesList.title: Shareholder Dispute - Tech Corp
casesList.description: Defended minority founders against a hostile buyout attempt by institutional venture funds.

name: Adv. Kavita Nair
bio: A passionate advocate for citizens' rights with 11 years of experience in consumer protection cases and RTI applications. Known for her landmark PIL victories in the Madras High Court.

faqs.question: What is the threshold for filing a case in District vs State Consumer Commissions?
faqs.answer: Under the Consumer Protection Act 2019, claims up to ₹50 Lakh go to the District Forum, ₹50 Lakh to ₹2 Crore to the State Commission, and above ₹2 Crore to the National Commission (NCDRC).

accolades.title: Public Interest Champion
accolades.description: Conferred by Chennai Lawyers' Forum for defending public safety laws.

casesList.title: Medical Negligence Compensation Claim
casesList.description: Secured ₹45 Lakh compensation for a client who suffered permanent injury due to surgical errors at a private hospital.

casesList.title: Landmark PIL - Lake Preservation
casesList.description: Madras High Court ordered state departments to remove all encroachments around East Coast road lakes.

name: Adv. Sanjay Patel
bio: Dean of labour law practice in Gujarat with 20 years of experience representing both employers and employees in industrial disputes, wrongful termination, and wage disputes.

faqs.question: What is the notice period requirement under industrial disputes acts?
faqs.answer: Typically, employers must serve a 30 to 90 day notice or provide salary in lieu of notice for non-executive employees, subject to industrial establishments' standing orders.

accolades.title: Lifetime Achievement in Industrial Law Advocacy
accolades.description: Presented by Gujarat Chambers of Commerce & Industry.

casesList.title: Mass Layoff Arbitration - Petrochemical Union
casesList.description: Represented 120 employees in securing double severance compensation for wrongful termination by a major conglomerate.

name: Adv. Neha Gupta
bio: Young but highly accomplished IP attorney specializing in trademark registration, copyright enforcement, and patent litigation. Represents major Indian and international brands.

faqs.question: How long does the trademark registration process take in India?
faqs.answer: If there are no objections or oppositions, trademark registration takes about 8 to 12 months from the date of application.

accolades.title: Rising Star - Intellectual Property
accolades.description: Awarded by Legal League Consulting for copyright protection frameworks.

casesList.title: Trademark Infringement Suit - E-Commerce Brand
casesList.description: Won a permanent injunction against a competitor copying the logo and product packaging of a premier clothing brand.

name: Adv. Arjun Singh
bio: Veteran criminal defense counsel with exceptional record in NDPS cases, bail applications, and appeals before the Allahabad High Court. Known for thorough case preparation and client advocacy.

faqs.question: What is the procedure for filing a regular bail application?
faqs.answer: We draft a petition summarizing the case, highlighting flaws in prosecution claims, lack of need for custodial interrogation, and present it before the Magistrate or Sessions Court.

accolades.title: Best Criminal Defense Lawyer - UP East
accolades.description: Honored by the Judicial Academy for legal acumen in complex cross-examinations.

casesList.title: Bail in NDPS Commercial Quantity Allegation
casesList.description: Established that procedural guidelines under Section 50 of the NDPS Act were violated during recovery, securing bail for the accused.

name: Adv. Divya Reddy
bio: Tax law expert with over 16 years of experience representing clients before the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal, GST Authority, and High Courts across India.
activeCourts: Customs, Excise & Service Tax Appellate Tribunal (CESTAT)

faqs.question: How do you handle retrospective tax assessment disputes?
faqs.answer: We evaluate constitutional grounds, check statutory limitation periods, and file a writ petition or statutory appeal depending on the notice validity.

accolades.title: Ranked Tier-1 Tax Council
accolades.description: Published in Chambers & Partners Asia Pacific Directory.

casesList.title: GST Notice Dismissal - Manufacturing Major

name: Adv. Manish Tiwari
bio: Expert in real estate transactions, property disputes, and RERA cases. Has represented hundreds of homebuyers in landmark cases against major builders in West Bengal and beyond.
activeCourts: WBRERA - West Bengal Real Estate Regulatory Authority

faqs.question: What is the grace period allowed to developers under RERA for delivery delay?
faqs.answer: Developers can claim force majeure or extension up to 1 year, beyond which homebuyers are entitled to refund with interest or monthly delay compensation.

accolades.title: Homebuyers' Choice Legal Counsel
accolades.description: Awarded by Consumer Forum Bengal for helping 50+ families secure RERA possession orders.

casesList.title: Homebuyers v. Horizon Infra Projects
casesList.description: Represented a group of 30 homebuyers in securing complete refund of booking amounts along with 10.5% annual interest for a 4-year project delay.

name: Adv. Pooja Iyer
bio: Cutting-edge technology lawyer specializing in cyber crime defense, data privacy compliance, and IT Act matters. Regularly advises tech startups and multinational companies on digital law.

faqs.question: How does the Digital Personal Data Protection Act affect Indian companies?
faqs.answer: The DPDP Act mandates explicit consent, data minimization, strict fiduciary responsibilities, and introduces penalties up to ₹250 Crore for data breaches.

accolades.title: IP & Cyber Counsel under 35
accolades.description: Featured in Business Legal India's annual list.

casesList.title: Identity Theft and Phishing Defense
casesList.description: Defended a tech executive falsely accused of corporate identity spoofing. Proved IP address spoofing occurred from outside India.

name: Adv. Vikram Malhotra
bio: India's foremost immigration attorney with 22 years of experience. Has helped thousands of clients with work visas, OCI cards, citizenship matters, and immigration-related litigations.

faqs.question: What is the process to appeal a rejected Business Visa?
faqs.answer: We review the denial notice, compile supplementary financial audits, business tie-up proofs, and submit an appeal petition to the consulate or High Court if applicable.

accolades.title: Global Mobility Counsel Designation
accolades.description: Conferred by the International Bar Association for cross-border migration achievements.
